description: Validates the Defender XDR portal authentication chain (Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey) every 10 minutes and writes the result to MDE_AuthTestResult_CL. First-run after deploy fires within 5 minutes (runOnStartup=true). Tests: ESTS sign-in -> sccauth cookie issuance -> portal API call. KQL: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL | top 1 by TimeGenerated desc shows current chain state.
